page.title: Agreement Documents
page.description: Manage NDA templates and agreement documents. Bind a template when sharing links with Require NDA.
page.documentsHint: Upload PDF agreements here. Creating a share link with Require NDA will register an active template from the selected file.
page.templatesEmpty: No NDA templates yet. Enable Require NDA on a share link, or upload an agreement document and share it once.
page.signaturesEmpty: No signatures yet for this template.
